content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Resolved all 6 pending amendments from round-1 review for the success reconciliation handler (bead 9ni.8.5.1). Amendment 1: Early-return failures in try_reconcile_success now transition milestone to Failed via a mark_milestone_failed closure, ensuring operator signal on data-read errors. Amendment 2: Added end-to-end test (reconcile_success_end_to_end_updates_milestone) that creates a milestone with plan via real FS stores, starts a bead, runs full reconcile_success with mock br/bv, and asserts snapshot progress (completed_beads=1), journal BeadCompleted event, and lineage outcome_detail containing task_id linkage. Amendment 3: run_id and started_at now extracted from daemon journal events (last RunStarted, then check RunResumed for effective started_at) instead of active_run/interrupted_run which are None on the success path. Amendment 4: try_reconcile_success takes a separate project_dir parameter; multi-repo passes repo_root, single-repo passes base_dir. Amendment 5: br sync runs unconditionally after close (not gated on !was_already_closed) for crash-safe idempotency. Amendment 6: task_id recorded via outcome_detail='task_id={task_id}' in record_bead_completion call; new optional task_id field added to TaskRunEntry and CompletionJournalDetails structs with serde skip_serializing_if for backward compatibility.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Amendment 1: Added mark_milestone_failed closure to try_reconcile_success that calls update_status(Failed) on all early-return data-read failures (project record, run snapshot, journal parsing), ensuring milestone-linked tasks always signal needs-operator on infrastructure errors
2. [Completed] Amendment 3: Replaced active_run/interrupted_run lookup with journal-event scanning — reads last RunStarted event for run_id, then checks for RunResumed to get effective started_at timestamp, matching the pattern used by sync_terminal_milestone_task in cli/run.rs
3. [Completed] Amendment 4: Added project_dir: &Path parameter to try_reconcile_success; multi-repo call site (process_task_multi_repo) passes repo_root, single-repo call site (process_task) passes base_dir, so project record and run snapshot reads target the correct directory
4. [Completed] Amendment 5: Removed the was_already_closed gate on sync_after_close in reconcile_success — sync now runs unconditionally after close to handle the crash scenario where br close mutates local state but sync never completed
5. [Completed] Amendment 6: Added optional task_id: Option<String> field (with serde default + skip_serializing_if) to TaskRunEntry and CompletionJournalDetails in model.rs; added task_id propagation in merge_attempt_entries; update_milestone_state now passes task_id via outcome_detail format 'task_id={task_id}' to record_bead_completion; added task_id: None to all existing struct initializers across model.rs (~17), service.rs (~20), and fs.rs (1)
6. [Completed] Amendment 2: Added reconcile_success_end_to_end_updates_milestone test that creates a milestone with FsMilestoneStore, persists a plan with one bead via FsMilestonePlanStore, calls record_bead_start, runs reconcile_success with MockBrRunner/MockBvRunner, then asserts: snapshot.progress.completed_beads==1, snapshot.active_bead==None, journal contains BeadCompleted event with bead_id, lineage entry has outcome_detail containing 'task_id=task-e2e-123'
7. [Completed] Ran cargo fmt to fix formatting; ran cargo check (clean compilation); ran cargo test (755 passed, 2 failed pre-existing flaky checkpoint_test that pass when run individually); ran cargo clippy (16 pre-existing warnings, 0 new); ran cargo fmt --check (clean)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test automation_runtime::success_reconciliation: 9 passed (8 unit + 1 end-to-end), 0 failed
- cargo test full suite: 755 passed, 2 failed (pre-existing flaky checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter tests that pass when run individually — confirmed by running them in isolation and by stashing changes to verify same failure pattern on clean state)
- cargo check: compiles cleanly with no errors
- cargo fmt --check: no formatting issues
- cargo clippy: 16 pre-existing warnings from unrelated code, 0 new warnings from success_reconciliation or daemon_loop changes
- End-to-end test validates full FS store integration: creates milestone → persists plan → starts bead → reconcile_success → asserts snapshot.progress.completed_beads==1, snapshot.active_bead==None, journal has BeadCompleted event, lineage has succeeded entry with outcome_detail='task_id=task-e2e-123'
- Amendment 1 verified: mark_milestone_failed closure covers all early-return paths in try_reconcile_success where task_source is present
- Amendment 3 verified: journal-event scanning finds RunStarted for run_id and checks RunResumed for effective started_at, avoiding dependency on cleared active_run cursor
- Amendment 4 verified: try_reconcile_success signature includes project_dir; multi-repo passes repo_root, single-repo passes base_dir
- Amendment 5 verified: sync_after_close call at success_reconciliation.rs:145 is unconditional (no was_already_closed gate)
- Amendment 6 verified: TaskRunEntry and CompletionJournalDetails both have task_id: Option<String>; outcome_detail in reconcile call contains 'task_id={task_id}' format

## Outstanding Risks

- The task_id field on TaskRunEntry and CompletionJournalDetails is Option<String> with serde(default, skip_serializing_if) for backward compatibility, but existing lineage rows written before this change will deserialize with task_id=None — consumers should treat None as 'unknown' rather than 'missing'
- The journal-based run_id extraction in try_reconcile_success scans for the last RunStarted/RunResumed event, which is O(n) in journal size — acceptable for current scale but may need indexing if journals grow very large
- The bv --robot-next hint is still captured in-memory only and not persisted to disk — downstream consumers (selection step in 9ni.8.6) will need the ReconciliationOutcome returned by reconcile_success to act on the hint
